learned_knockout_adjustments.target_accuracy_note: 90% is an ambition target, not a guaranteed property; the model now reports confidence and penalty risk instead of pretending certainty.

lessons: Draw outcomes hurt the group model; knockout conversion must treat draw mass as extra-time/penalty risk, not discard it.
Several misses assigned very low probability to the actual outcome; widen uncertainty bands before elimination matches.
Away-side/favorite bias appeared in misses; neutralize nominal home/away wording in knockout fixtures.
source: Derived from outputs/accuracy_report.json completed group-stage forecast audit.
